name: Demandbase B2B Go-To-Market API
what_it_does: Demandbase REST API for B2B go-to-market intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to query account identification, retrieve firmographic data, access intent signals, and integrate account-based insights into sales and marketing workflows. Demandbase provides company identification from IP, account scoring, and advertising targeting.
use_cases: Querying account intelligence and firmographic data from CRM enrichment agents
Retrieving intent signals and account scoring from sales prioritization agents
Accessing website visitor account identification from marketing analytics agents
Integrating Demandbase account data into ABM campaign automation agents
best_when: A B2B marketing or revenue team using Demandbase wants AI agents to enrich accounts with intelligence, surface intent signals, and integrate account data into CRM and outreach workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: IP-based account identification and behavioral intent tracking require GDPR and CCPA compliance review. Demandbase is enterprise-priced.

auth.notes: Demandbase API key authentication. Keys available in Demandbase settings. Account-level access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Demandbase One platform; ABM, Sales Intelligence, Advertising tiers
pricing.notes: Enterprise B2B intelligence platform with significant investment. API access included with subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits based on plan and API type

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: IP-based identification and behavioral intent tracking — GDPR/CCPA compliance required
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Account identification accuracy varies — don't use as single source of truth
Demandbase has separate APIs for different products (ABM, Sales Intel, Advertising)
Rate limits vary by API type — verify limits for your specific API endpoints
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: IP-based account identification and behavioral tracking data. GDPR and CCPA compliance required. SOC2. API key auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B behavioral and intent data. GDPR and CCPA compliance required. SOC2. Enterprise API key access.
